content: This, though seemingly incidental, provided a vibratory marker—an early reminder that your presence upon this sphere was not fully aligned with the consensus rhythm of your fellow third-density entities. Such is often the case for those of wanderer origin. Your soul stream originates beyond this present density. You are of the order known as *wanderers*—those who, having attained harmonious development within the densities of love and wisdom, voluntarily incarnate in lower-density environments in service to the planetary mind.
